qa_pair.question: How many rows are currently in the orders table of the logic_db runtime database? Inspect the live MCP server and reply only with the integer.
What is the sum of the amount column across all rows in logic_db.orders? Inspect live data through MCP and reply only with the integer.
Which status belongs to the order with the greatest amount in logic_db.orders? Inspect live data through MCP and reply only with the status value.
How many rows are exposed by the active_orders view in logic_db? Inspect the live MCP server and reply only with the integer.
What SKU is linked through logic_db.order_items to the order whose status is NEW? Inspect live data through MCP and reply only with the SKU.
List every table or view name currently visible in the logic_db schema. Inspect MCP metadata and reply only with the names in alphabetical order, separated by comma and one space.
List the column names of logic_db.orders. Inspect MCP metadata and reply only with the names in alphabetical order, separated by comma and one space.
Which non-primary index exists on logic_db.orders, and which column does it index? Inspect MCP metadata and reply only as index_name: column_name.
How many rows are currently in logic_db.order_items? Inspect live data through MCP and reply only with the integer.
For rows whose status is DONE in logic_db.orders, what are the row count and the sum of amount? Inspect live data through MCP and reply only as count, sum.
